Uses of Interface
com.societegenerale.failover.core.store.FailoverStore

Packages that use FailoverStore
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.store
Store abstraction and default in-memory implementation.
com.societegenerale.failover.store
Concrete FailoverStore implementations.
com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant
Multi-tenant failover store with per-tenant routing.

  • Uses of FailoverStore in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return FailoverStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverStore<Object>
    FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration.asyncFailoverStore(TenantStoreFactory<Object> storeFactory, org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor failoverTaskExecutor)
    Async store: FailoverStoreAsync(DefaultFailoverStore(raw)).
    FailoverStore<Object>
    FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration.asyncMultiTenantFailoverStore(TenantResolver tenantResolver, TenantStoreFactory<Object> rawFactory, FailoverProperties props, org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor failoverTaskExecutor)
    Async multi-tenant store: MultiTenantFailoverStore with per-tenant FailoverStoreAsync(DefaultFailoverStore(raw)) decorator.
    FailoverStore<Object>
    FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration.syncFailoverStore(TenantStoreFactory<Object> storeFactory)
    Sync store: DefaultFailoverStore(raw).
    FailoverStore<Object>
    FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration.syncMultiTenantFailoverStore(TenantResolver tenantResolver, TenantStoreFactory<Object> rawFactory, FailoverProperties props)
    Sync multi-tenant store: MultiTenantFailoverStore with per-tenant DefaultFailoverStore(raw) decorator.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with parameters of type FailoverStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverHandler<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverHandler(KeyGenerator keyGenerator, ExpiryPolicy<Object> expiryPolicy, FailoverClock clock, FailoverStore<Object> failoverStore, PayloadEnricher<Object> payloadEnricher, RecoveredPayloadHandler recoveredPayloadHandler, CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, PayloadSplitterLookup<Object,Object> payloadSplitterLookup, ContextPropagator contextPropagator, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor> scatterGatherExecutorProvider)
    Assembles the full FailoverHandler decorator chain: AdvancedFailoverHandler(ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(DefaultFailoverHandler)).

  • Uses of FailoverStore in com.societegenerale.failover.core.store

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.store that implement FailoverStore
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultFailoverStore<T>
    Default FailoverStore decorator that ensures every payload written to or read from the delegate store has its upToDate flag forced to false.

  • Uses of FailoverStore in com.societegenerale.failover.store

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.store that implement FailoverStore
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FailoverStoreAsync<T>
    FailoverStore decorator that offloads write operations (FailoverStoreAsync.store(com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.ReferentialPayload<T>), FailoverStoreAsync.delete(com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.ReferentialPayload<T>), FailoverStoreAsync.cleanByExpiry(java.time.Instant)) to a TaskExecutor, keeping the calling thread unblocked.
    class 
    FailoverStoreCaffeine<T>
    FailoverStore implementation backed by a single Caffeine in-memory cache.
    class 
    FailoverStoreInmemory<T>
    FailoverStore implementation backed by a plain ConcurrentHashMap.
    class 
    FailoverStoreJdbc<T>
    JDBC-backed FailoverStore implementation.

  • Uses of FailoverStore in com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant that implement FailoverStore
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MultiTenantFailoverStore<T>
    Outermost FailoverStore decorator that routes every operation to the correct per-tenant store.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant that return FailoverStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverStore<T>
    TenantStoreFactory.create(String tenantId)
    Creates a raw FailoverStore for the given tenantId.
